skipped_criteria: ICU admission after resuscitation from witnessed non-traumatic OHCA of presumably cardiac etiology with shockable rhythm: no schema fields for witnessed status, OHCA setting, cardiac etiology, or presenting rhythm type.
Unconsciousness after return of spontaneous circulation (ROSC): GCS used as proxy but ROSC status is not a schema field.
Duration of CPR ≤ 40 minutes: no schema field for CPR duration.
Initiation of study intervention ≤ 4 hours from ROSC: no schema field for time-from-ROSC.
Stable SaO2 ≥ 94% with FiO2 of 30%: no schema fields for oxygen saturation or FiO2.
Non-witnessed cardiac arrest (exclusion): no schema field for witnessed status.
Cardiac arrest of traumatic origin or non-cardiac cause (exclusion): partially covered by mechanism=cardiac_arrest inclusion but traumatic origin sub-distinction not fully expressible.
Non-shockable presenting rhythm (PEA and asystole) exclusion: no schema field for cardiac rhythm.
Female of childbearing potential defined as younger than 50 years (exclusion): age-sex compound criterion not fully expressible; pregnancy_status exclusion partially covers this.
Known terminal illness (exclusion): no schema field for terminal illness.
Pre-cardiac arrest cerebral performance category (CPC) ≥ 3 (exclusion): no schema field for CPC.
Participation in another clinical trial (exclusion): no schema field for concurrent trial enrollment.
